sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79038" key="parafraktiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραφρακτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n79038.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing constipation</tr_>, Xcnocr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.87</biblScope> </bibl> (<abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">παρεκ</itype>-).</sense> </entryFree>
